The '''Alluuvian system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. One of its [[Planet/Legends|planets]] was [[Alluuvia]].

{{System-stub}}
